title: Toggle lattice
intuition: A spatial field of locally coupled cells can settle into GFP-like, RFP-like, or low-expression patches, then reorganize through noise and neighborhood bias.
biologicalInterpretation: A coarse browser sketch of bistable or toggle-like genetic regulation distributed across a communicating population.

title: Reaction-diffusion
relatedProject: Synthetic Genetic Network for Biochemical Noise and Pattern Formation
intuition: Short-range activation and slower recovery or inhibition can create traveling fronts, excitable media, and spiral-like structure from simple local rules.
biologicalInterpretation: Useful for thinking about wave propagation, morphogen-like signaling, and activator-inhibitor pattern formation in biological media.

title: Quorum sensing
relatedProject: Ising-Like Spatial Patterns in Bacterial Populations
intuition: Agents locally contribute to a shared signal field and switch behavior once the accumulated signal crosses a threshold.
biologicalInterpretation: A compact way to explain bacterial communication, density-dependent coordination, and distributed decision-making in space.

title: Predator-prey particles
relatedProject: Open-Source Biotechnology and Molecular Biology Education
intuition: Interacting populations can produce spatial chasing fronts, refuges, and cyclical density fluctuations without centralized control.
biologicalInterpretation: An ecological collective-behavior sketch for explaining coexistence, pursuit, avoidance, and local environmental pressure.

title: SIR waves
relatedProject: Open-Source Biotechnology and Molecular Biology Education
intuition: Spatial spread models show why local contact structure matters: fronts can stall, accelerate, or fragment even when global averages look simple.
biologicalInterpretation: A browser teaching sketch for epidemic propagation, contact structure, and intervention intuition in extended populations.

title: Ising-like lattice
relatedProject: Ising-Like Spatial Patterns in Bacterial Populations
intuition: Local agreement, noise, and weak external fields can shift a system between disordered mixtures and large coherent domains.
biologicalInterpretation: A statistical-physics bridge for interpreting switching populations, domain boundaries, and order-disorder transitions in biology.
